Government Cleaning Services

Secure, reliable cleaning for government offices, courthouses, community centers, and public facilities. MBE-certified for diversity procurement compliance. GreenPoint Maintenance Services is an MBE-certified provider serving facilities across NY, NJ, CT, PA, and FL with real-time cleaning verification through JaniTrack.

Get an Instant Quote →Schedule Walkthrough
Government Cleaning

What's Included in Our Government Cleaning Program

Every government cleaning engagement includes a customized cleaning plan built around your facility's specific needs, schedule, and compliance requirements.

✓
MBE/MWBE certification for procurement
✓
Background-checked and cleared staff
✓
Secure facility cleaning protocols
✓
ADA-compliant service delivery
✓
Public restroom high-frequency programs
✓
After-hours and weekend availability
SAM.gov RegisteredMBE/MWBE CertifiedBackground CheckedADA Compliant

Common Government Cleaning Challenges We Solve

Facility managers consistently tell us about the same frustrations with their previous cleaning providers. Here's how GreenPoint addresses each one.

✓
Meeting diversity procurement requirements
✓
Security clearance and background check requirements
✓
High-traffic public spaces needing constant upkeep
✓
Budget constraints with quality expectations

Service Areas for Government Cleaning

We provide government cleaning services across five states. Select your location to learn more.

✓
New York (NY): Bronx, Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Staten Island, Yonkers, New Rochelle, Mount Vernon, White Plains, Westchester
✓
New Jersey (NJ): Newark, Jersey City, Paterson, Elizabeth, Hackensack, Fort Lee, Hoboken, Clifton, Passaic, East Orange
✓
Connecticut (CT): Stamford, Bridgeport, New Haven, Hartford, Norwalk, Danbury, Waterbury, Greenwich
✓
Pennsylvania (PA): Philadelphia, Allentown, Scranton, Bethlehem, Reading, King of Prussia, Norristown, Chester
✓
Florida (FL): Orlando, Miami, Fort Lauderdale, Kissimmee, Miami Beach, Coral Gables, Hialeah, Pembroke Pines
